name: Zelos Wilder
description: __Height:__ 179 cm (5'10") __Weapon__ Sword, Dagger Zelos is the Chosen One from Tethe'alla. He is rarely serious and acts as a comic relief for the group, always ready to cheer the party up at heavy-hearted moments. Quite the ladies' man (one of his possible titles is called _Gigolo_, which he gets by speaking to every female character in the world, while another, _Casanova_, can be received by his being in a party with three female characters), he has the ability to charm every woman he sees,

name: Artezia Rosan
description: Artezia "Tia" Rozan is the apparent heir to the house of Marquess Rozan.

name: Asami Oikawa
description: Mei's classmate and friend who has a complex about her large chest. She hates that people always stare at it and that no one seems to like her for her. She idolizes Yamato because he defended her in middle school, and wishes for a prince of her own to protect her.

name: Avakian
description: The Package of Darkness that Sanko bears. Somewhat different from your usual luggage.

name: Ayase Kishimoto
description: Ayase is a third-year Suimei Academy student by day and vocalist by night. She sings for a popular indies rock band named "Phantasm". Her stage name is "FES". The lyrics in her songs appears to describe the events of the recent murders, leading the police to see her as a potential suspect.

name: Deus Ex Machina
nativeName: デウス・エクス・マキナ
description: The god of time and space, Yukiteru's supposed imaginary friend and the mastermind behind the game. He is looking for a successor, which is why he gave future diaries to twelve candidates and placed them in a game of life and death. He seems to favor Yukiteru the most out of all the other candidates as his next possible successor due to the miracles Yukiteru is able to pull off, not paying attention to the fact that Yuno is helping him. _Deus_ means God in Latin.
searchTerms: デウス・エクス・マキナ

name: Eru Miru
description: Eru Miru is an engineer in the Giftia maintenance team at Terminal Service #1, who has been on the job for two years. (Source: Plastic Memories Wiki)

description: An in-school celebrity with an unparalleled beauty.

name: Frog
description: He's just a random frog that bounces around. He is also sometimes involved in Popee's mischief. ~!He reveals Kedamono's secret of not being a human.!~

name: Fumi Nishioka
description: Fumi is a second year student at Kurokado Private High School and a Sweeper apprentice for the Horikita Clan. She's a very determined, headstrong girl, who despite being in uncomfortable situations, keeps a positive mindset. She also possesses the powers of a Queen.

name: Gunther
description: __Family structure__ ~! Wife: [Effa](https://anilist.co/character/126527) First child: miscarriage Second child: boy (died before the age of one) Daughter: [Tuuli](https://anilist.co/character/126526) Daughter: [Myne](https://anilist.co/character/126156) Fifth child: died unable to cross winter Sixth child: miscarriage Son: [Kamil](https://anilist.co/character/157140) Paternal relatives Second cousin: [Deid](https://anilist.co/character/140074) (Gunther's father and Deid's mother are cousins)!~

name: Hanabi Kawai
description: Hanabi Kawai was a student at Setouchi Keijo Training School. She was ranked third in the Elite Class. Upon graduating from Setouchi, Hanabi officially becomes a B-Rank Keijo player, affiliated with the Kansai's Kyoto Branch, and is mentored by Kyoko Shirayuki. After collecting enough points, she is able to advance to the A-Rank.

name: Higashi no Kaioushin
description: East Kaioushin is the supreme ruler of the Eastern Quadrant of the Universe along with his best friends, and under his superior, Dai Kaioshin (Grand Supreme Kai). He is short, purple skinned with white hair, dressed in a posh Kaio outfit and always accompanied by his ever-loyal bodyguard and friend, Kibito. East Kaioshin survived Majin Buu's assault on the Kaioshin Kai to become the only surviving Kaioshin, when rescued by his bodyguard. East Kaioshin mentions that he was the weakest of the four

name: Housen Ryofu
description: __Height__: 166 cm __Three Kingdoms counterpart__: Lu Bu __School__: Rakuyou College, 3rd Year __Toushi Rank__: A-Rank A strong bisexual fighter with a very promiscuous personality and a habit for dressing skimpy. She was very skilled at making chi-blasts and was in love with both Saji and her best friend Chinkyuu. name: Howard Lovecraft
nativeName: ハワード・フィリップス・ラヴクラフト
description: **Height:** 190 cm **Ability:** The Great Old Ones A member of The Guild. His name is a reference to H. P. Lovecraft, the American author who achieved posthumous fame through his influential works of horror fiction.

name: Hyourinmaru
description: __Master:__ [Toushirou Hitsugaya](https://anilist.co/character/245) Hyourinmaru is the manifested spirit of Toushirou Hitsugaya's Zanpakutou that is seen during the Zanpakutou Unknown Tales arc. At any time, Hyourinmaru can take the form of a gigantic, icy blue, serpentine dragon with large wings and an echoing voice.
